chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 110 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.997/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.998/2024 (C/A) 14.01.2026 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Ali Gul Shah, District Health Officer, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2. Learned Additional AG submits a statement on behalf of District Health Officer, Sukkur, which states that the Summary moved to the Chief Minister Sindh for appointment of petitioner on deceased quota, has been approved and the matter is pending process for issuing offer letter, for which the petitioner is required to fulfill codal formalities. It is clarified by Petitioner’s Counsel that his case is not hit by the judgment in the case of General Post Office, Islamabad and others vs. Muhammad Jalal (PLD 2024 SC 1276) as the petition had been allowed prior thereto. Given the aforesaid facts, where the Summary for petitioner’s appointment on deceased quota has been approved, there is no case for contempt of Court. The contempt application is dismissed with the observation that the respondents shall proceed further in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
